description: Treatise on the laws of impurity, with ownership notes. In Judaeo-Arabic: "property of al-Muwaffaq b. Moshe." In Arabic script at the bottom, a much later note indicating transfer of ownership to Abū l-Ḥasan b. Qaṭīna (? قطينا)
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
